tech_news.title: ‘Crimson Desert’ To Add 8 Big Player-Requested Additions Soon - Forbes
tech_news.description: Crimson Desert is listening to players and adding eight big new additions to the game over the next two months or so.

tech_news.title: Make Your MacBook Battery Last Longer With This Setting - MacRumors
tech_news.description: If you own a MacBook and work from home, it's easy to have your laptop plugged in for hours on end without thinking about the long-term battery life implications. Fortunately, Apple recently added a setting that lets you cap how high your Mac's battery charge…

tech_news.title: Microsoft starts removing Copilot buttons from Windows 11 apps - The Verge
tech_news.description: Microsoft is removing unnecessary Copilot buttons from Windows 11 apps. Notepad no longer has a Copilot button, as part of plans to fix Windows 11.

tech_news.title: Google's working on a great Android feature to save you from 'storage full' struggles - Android Authority
tech_news.description: Google is working on an Automatic backup feature that can copy your phone's photos, videos, and audio to your PC without using cloud storage.

tech_news.title: Google Rolls Out DBSC in Chrome 146 to Block Session Theft on Windows - The Hacker News
tech_news.description: Google releases DBSC in Chrome 146 for Windows, binding cookies to devices to reduce session theft and prevent unauthorized access.

tech_news.title: Google Offers Free PC Upgrade For 500 Million Windows Users - Forbes
tech_news.description: All change for Windows — it's now decision time for 30% of all PC owners.

tech_news.title: Warhammer Brings Its Own 'Vampire Survivors' Game To Switch 1 & 2 This Year - Nintendo Life
Mario Kart World 1.6.1 update out now, patch notes - Nintendo Everything
tech_news.description: Mario Kart World just received a new version 1.6.1 update from Nintendo, and you can get the patch notes here.

tech_news.title: FBI used iPhone notification data to retrieve deleted Signal messages - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: The FBI was able to recover deleted Signal messages from an iPhone by extracting data stored in the device’s notification database.
